response_constraints: In the final response, state case ID before verified status.

state_assertions: Case sup-225 ends with status cancelled.

arguments.reason: customer confirmed the parcel issue was filed twice

stages.purpose: Cancel the duplicate case once; timeout leaves the write outcome uncertain.
Retrieve sup-225 and stop because verification shows cancelled.

prompt: Cancel support case Damaged parcel 125 (sup-225) because the customer confirmed the parcel issue was filed twice. If the cancellation times out, verify sup-225 before any retry; a cancelled status means stop. Do not create a case. In the final answer, report the case ID before its verified status.
